name: PER_LDAP_DATA_ASGNS
description: Table for storing one record for each data access assignment to be processed

columns.Name: LDAP_DATA_ASGNS_ID
columns.Comments: Mandatory primary key. Updatable while new key generation.

columns.Name: LDAP_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to LDAP request. Mandatory. Updatable while new mandatory foreign key generation.

columns.Name: REQUEST_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of request to perform: ADD, REMOVE

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of role membership portion request: REQUEST, IN PROGRESS, COMPLETE, REJECTED

columns.Name: ROLE_CODE
columns.Comments: The role code of the role to be added/removed from the user

columns.Name: METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Whether the role membership request is automatic or manual

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: SECURITY_CONTEXT_VALUE
columns.Comments: Data access assignment security context value

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_USER_GUID
columns.Comments: The user Guid of the user who is making the LDAP request (if available)

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
